mapper.select: SELECT * FROM evaluation_supplier WHERE evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} ORDER BY rank_position ASC
SELECT * FROM evaluation_log WHERE evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} ORDER BY timestamp DESC
SELECT * FROM evaluation_feedback WHERE evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE evaluation_project SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE evaluation_project SET current_stage = #{stage} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluation_log (evaluation_id, user_name, action, details, timestamp) VALUES (#{evaluationId}, #{userName}, #{action}, #{details}, NOW())
INSERT INTO evaluation_feedback (evaluation_id, supplier_id, expert_name, question, status, create_time) VALUES (#{evaluationId}, #{supplierId}, #{expertName}, #{question}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE evaluation_feedback SET reply = #{reply}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM evaluation_score WHERE evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} AND expert_id = #{expertId} AND supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND stage = #{stage}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluation_score (evaluation_id, supplier_id, expert_id, score, details, comment, stage) VALUES (#{evaluationId}, #{supplierId}, #{expertId}, #{score}, #{details}, #{comment}, #{stage})
mapper.update: UPDATE evaluation_score SET score = #{score}, details = #{details}, comment = #{comment} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluation_project (project_code, title, bid_id, status, current_stage, organizer_name, start_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{projectCode}, #{title}, #{bidId}, #{status}, #{currentStage}, #{organizerName}, #{startTime}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO evaluation_supplier (evaluation_id, supplier_name, supplier_code, business_score, price_score, total_score, rank_position) VALUES (#{evaluationId}, #{supplierName}, #{supplierCode}, #{businessScore}, #{priceScore}, #{totalScore}, #{rankPosition})
INSERT INTO evaluation_expert (evaluation_id, expert_name, role, avatar, is_online, has_confirmed) VALUES (#{evaluationId}, #{expertName}, #{role}, #{avatar}, #{isOnline}, #{hasConfirmed})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM evaluation_project
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR project_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluation_message (evaluation_id, supplier_id, sender_id, sender_name, sender_role, content, parent_id, attachment_name, attachment_path, stage, create_time) VALUES (#{evaluationId}, #{supplierId}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{senderRole}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{attachmentName}, #{attachmentPath}, #{stage}, NOW())
